case_title: INVESTMENT RETRIEVERS INC. VS. ROBERT J ODONNELL et al

docket_entries.description: EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ODONNELL, ROBERT J
